meta.sources: Walk Score, U.S. Census ACS 2022, Census CBP 2022, NIAAA Surveillance Report #120
meta.method: Normalized scoring from public data sources. Tourist-market bar density capped at 4.0/10K. See scrape-instructions/ for full methodology.
